scripts.age: terser gutenberg-gallery-to-slider.js -o gutenberg-gallery-to-slider.min.js --compress && grep -l -E 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' ./* --include='*.html' --include='*.css' --include='*.scss' --include='*.js' --include='*.ts' --include='README.md' -s | xargs sed -i -E -e "s/v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+/${npm_config_age}/g" && git add . && git commit -m 'age' && git tag ${npm_config_age}
